body.title: CLOSED: DB query as MCP capability — query/dispatch verbs + skill consumer migration
body.result: db_query+db_dispatch in igor_mcp.py; 12 tests; context-load Steps 2a/2b + day-close-audit Steps 9/12 migrated from psql; commit f7e35cd0
body.description:
**Approved 2026-05-03 (Akien — 'all is approved! go!').** First concrete capability migration under theigors/rules/capability-protocol. Replaces ad-hoc `psql -tAc` shell-outs with an MCP query/dispatch capability that uses the shared verb set.

**Two-sided per the rule:** ships handler (MCP capability) AND skill consumer (skill files updated to call it).

**Capability surface (matches theigors/rules/capability-protocol/vocabulary):**
- `query(sql, params)` — read-only SELECT, returns rows. No state change.
- `dispatch(sql, params)` — write op (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE), returns request id.
- `status(id)` / `result(id)` — for async dispatch (initially synchronous, async-shaped for future).

**Affected files:** 
- HANDLER: lab/claudecode/mcp_server.py or agent_datacenter/devices/db/db_capability.py (NEW MCP tool registration), wild_igor/igor/memory/db_proxy.py (delegate path).
- SKILL CONSUMER: /home/akien/.claude/skills/context-load/SKILL.md (replace `psql -tAc` blocks with mcp__igor__db_query calls), /home/akien/.claude/skills/day-close-audit/SKILL.md (same), /home/akien/.claude/skills/day-close/SKILL.md (same).
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/capability-protocol (parent), theigors/rules/capability-protocol/vocabulary (uses `query`/`dispatch`), theigors/rules/capability-protocol/two-sided-build (handler + skill ship together), theigors/rules/database (Postgres + db_proxy invariants preserved).
**Scope boundary:** IN: query + dispatch MCP tools, migrate the highest-traffic skill psql call sites (context-load, day-close, day-close-audit). OUT: migrate every psql in the lab/ scripts (those stay bash for now). OUT: full async dispatch (sync now, async-shape preserved for later).
**Test plan:** pytest for the MCP handler (read + write paths against test DB); CC.1 integration test that loads /context-load skill and asserts mcp__igor__db_query is called instead of bash psql; manual: run /context-load and verify behavior unchanged.
